title: ParseStepRecord
description: One JSONL record emitted by plcc-parser-table to trace LL(1) parsing. Emitted before the tree record when --trace is active, or unconditionally before an error record on parse failure.

oneOf.title: PredictStep
oneOf.description: The parser selects a production for a nonterminal based on the current lookahead token.

production.description: The chosen production rule name, or null for arbno iterations.

oneOf.title: ShiftStep
oneOf.description: The parser matches and consumes a terminal token.

oneOf.title: CompleteStep
oneOf.description: The parser finishes processing a production rule.

rule.description: The production rule name that was completed.
